LanguageData.Ammo_792x94mmPatronen_FMJ.label: 7.92x94mm Patronen (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_792x94mmPatronen_FMJ.description: Old-school anti-tank cartridge originally designed for AT rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_792x94mmPatronen_AP.label: 7.92x94mm Patronen (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_792x94mmPatronen_AP.description: Old-school anti-tank cartridge originally designed for AT rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_792x94mmPatronen_Incendiary.label: 7.92x94mm Patronen (AP-I)
LanguageData.Ammo_792x94mmPatronen_Incendiary.descrip: Old-school anti-tank cartridge originally designed for AT rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_792x94mmPatronen_HE.label: 7.92x94mm Patronen (AP-HE)
LanguageData.Ammo_792x94mmPatronen_HE.description: Old-school anti-tank cartridge originally designed for AT rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_792x94mmPatronen_Sabot.label: 7.92x94mm Patronen (Sabot)
LanguageData.Ammo_792x94mmPatronen_Sabot.description: Old-school anti-tank cartridge originally designed for AT rifles.
LanguageData.Bullet_792x94mmPatronen_FMJ.label: 7.92x94mm Patronen bullet (FMJ)
LanguageData.Bullet_792x94mmPatronen_AP.label: 7.92x94mm Patronen bullet (AP)
LanguageData.Bullet_792x94mmPatronen_Incendiary.label: 7.92x94mm Patronen bullet (AP-I)
LanguageData.Bullet_792x94mmPatronen_HE.label: 7.92x94mm Patronen bullet (AP-HE)
LanguageData.Bullet_792x94mmPatronen_Sabot.label: 7.92x94mm Patronen bullet (Sabot)
LanguageData.Ammo_762x51mmUNSC_FMJ.label: 7.62x51mm UNSC cartridge (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_762x51mmUNSC_FMJ.description: An improved version of the ancient 7.62x51mm cartridge, featuring a hardened penetrator and better propellent to counter advancements in body armour. A tiny amount of stopping power is sacrificed to achieve this superior penetrative capability. It is used by a large number of UNSC weaponry.
LanguageData.Ammo_762x51mmUNSC_AP.label: 7.62x51mm UNSC cartridge (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_762x51mmUNSC_AP.description: An improved version of the ancient 7.62x51mm cartridge, featuring a hardened penetrator and better propellent to counter advancements in body armour. A tiny amount of stopping power is sacrificed to achieve this superior penetrative capability. It is used by a large number of UNSC weaponry.
LanguageData.Ammo_762x51mmUNSC_HP.label: 7.62x51mm UNSC cartridge (HP)
LanguageData.Ammo_762x51mmUNSC_HP.description: An improved version of the ancient 7.62x51mm cartridge, featuring a hardened penetrator and better propellent to counter advancements in body armour. A tiny amount of stopping power is sacrificed to achieve this superior penetrative capability. It is used by a large number of UNSC weaponry.
LanguageData.Ammo_762x51mmUNSC_Shredder.label: 7.62x51mm UNSC cartridge (Shredder)
LanguageData.Ammo_762x51mmUNSC_Shredder.description: An improved version of the ancient 7.62x51mm cartridge, featuring a hardened penetrator and better propellent to counter advancements in body armour. A tiny amount of stopping power is sacrificed to achieve this superior penetrative capability. It is used by a large number of UNSC weaponry.
LanguageData.Ammo_762x51mmUNSC_Incendiary.label: 7.62x51mm UNSC cartridge (AP-I)
LanguageData.Ammo_762x51mmUNSC_Incendiary.description: An improved version of the ancient 7.62x51mm cartridge, featuring a hardened penetrator and better propellent to counter advancements in body armour. A tiny amount of stopping power is sacrificed to achieve this superior penetrative capability. It is used by a large number of UNSC weaponry.
LanguageData.Ammo_762x51mmUNSC_HE.label: 7.62x51mm UNSC cartridge (HEDP)
LanguageData.Ammo_762x51mmUNSC_HE.description: An improved version of the ancient 7.62x51mm cartridge, featuring a hardened penetrator and better propellent to counter advancements in body armour. A tiny amount of stopping power is sacrificed to achieve this superior penetrative capability. It is used by a large number of UNSC weaponry.
LanguageData.Ammo_762x51mmUNSC_Sabot.label: 7.62x51mm UNSC cartridge (Sabot)
LanguageData.Ammo_762x51mmUNSC_Sabot.description: An improved version of the ancient 7.62x51mm cartridge, featuring a hardened penetrator and better propellent to counter advancements in body armour. A tiny amount of stopping power is sacrificed to achieve this superior penetrative capability. It is used by a large number of UNSC weaponry.

LanguageData.Ammo_75FK_FMJ.label: 7.5 FK (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_75FK_FMJ.description: A high-velocity bottlenecked handgun cartridge capable of penetrating lightly armored targets.
LanguageData.Ammo_75FK_AP.label: 7.5 FK (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_75FK_AP.description: A high-velocity bottlenecked handgun cartridge capable of penetrating lightly armored targets.

LanguageData.Ammo_75FK_HP.description: A high-velocity bottlenecked handgun cartridge capable of penetrating lightly armored targets.

LanguageData.Ammo_792x57mmMauser_FMJ.label: 7.92x57mm Mauser (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_792x57mmMauser_FMJ.description: Large rifle bullet used in machine guns, sniper rifles and the occasional assault rifle.

LanguageData.Ammo_792x57mmMauser_HE.description: Large rifle bullet used in machine guns, sniper rifles and the occasional assault rifle.
